text.title: Function Calling Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to ship a cross-vendor function-calling stack.

step.name: design-tools
step.input: List of external actions + structured outputs needed.
step.action: Per action, write {name, description ≥30 chars, version, schema_id, input_schema, category, side_effects}. Validate via the registry validator.
step.decision-gate: If N > 20, plan the router upfront.

step.name: wire-validator
step.action: Build `validate_args(tool_name, args) -> ValidationResult`. Hook into the agent loop before execute().

step.name: write-router
step.action: Implement two-stage router: first LLM picks a category; second pass surfaces tools of that category only.

step.name: write-loop
step.action: Implement agent loop per templates/agent-loop.py: dispatch parallel tools concurrently, append full response.content, max_turns=15.

step.name: handle-errors
step.input: Tool taxonomy of recoverable vs terminal errors.
step.action: Wrap each tool with the recoverable/terminal classification; return recoverable as content, terminal as is_error.
step.decision-gate: Sample 5 errors; verify model recovers on ≥4.

step.name: eval-and-ship
step.action: Run end-to-end eval; record tool-selection accuracy, validation-error rate, latency, cost.
step.decision-gate: Tool-selection accuracy ≥95% on the eval before shipping.
